blockerNotes: The one-deal implementation may proceed only inside the exact allowlist below. VP-3.46 runs in parallel only as the PostgreSQL RLS verification gate. Critical product zones remain generally forbidden; only the exact files listed in allowedCurrentScope are unlocked.

industrialOneDealFoundation.layer: Canonical PostgreSQL deal command path and shared role workspace
requiredInvariants: one deal identity and one factual state for all roles
trusted transaction-local RLS for canonical reads and writes
strict command idempotency inside the trusted transaction
no human confirmation of bank reserve or release
no synthetic successful backend or bank reference
server-derived tenant organization role and actor
legacy controller role allowlists remain intact
test seed is explicit idempotent and production-denied by default

parallelInfrastructure.layer: VP-3.46 Ephemeral PostgreSQL RLS Integration Harness
requiredInvariants: required API Tests workflow runs PostgreSQL 16 tenant isolation
legacy permissive migration policies are removed
application assertions run as NOSUPERUSER NOBYPASSRLS
own-tenant graph is visible and cross-tenant graph is denied
all five trusted context fields are mandatory
transaction-local context is cleared after commit on the same session
only ephemeral localhost database credentials are accepted
no production database or migration execution

nextAfterCurrentGreen: industrial one-deal ephemeral PostgreSQL E2E harness
local database bootstrap order and explicit RLS activation
persistent identity session refresh-family revoke and MFA
durable outbox worker and bank reconciliation
load restore DR and accessibility acceptance
readiness: 85% honest architectural readiness. The current product layer remains Industrial One Deal Foundation. Parallel VP-3.46 adds ephemeral PostgreSQL 16 RLS evidence only; it does not prove production deployment, production database migration, live external integration, persistent identity, load, restore or disaster recovery.
